text.title: Agentic RAG Query Decomposition Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from planner setup to merged context.

step.name: confirm-compound-class
step.action: Check compound-query rate >15% and atomic-fallback-cost acceptable.

step.name: wire-planner
step.action: Prompt explicitly says: "Emit 2–4 atomic sub-queries; return [] if atomic".

step.name: cap-and-confidence-rank
step.action: If <2 → fallback atomic. If >4 → keep top-4 by confidence.

step.name: parallel-retrieve-and-track-coverage
step.action: asyncio.gather. Per sub-query: count chunks above `confidence_threshold`. Tag zero-coverage sub-queries.

step.name: merge-and-surface-gaps
step.action: Concatenate + dedup by chunk_id. Append "Coverage gaps: [...]" to audit log.
